title: Gasteranthus wendlandianus
taxonomy: Gasteranthus wendlandianus is a species of flowering plant in the family Bignonaceae, which is a family of flowering plants in the order Lamiales. This plant belongs to the genus Gasteranthus, which consists of various species of epiphytic plants. Gasteranthus wendlandianus is native to Central America, specifically in countries such as Costa Rica and Panama. Within the Bignonaceae family, Gasteranthus wendlandianus is classified as a member of the tribe Bignonieae. The plant's classification is further detailed at the species level, where it is recognized by its unique characteristics and features.
